en: Here's today's shot of one-minute inspiration from Shakespeare, Lessons on Personal Power.
To thy known self be true, from Hamlet. This is by no means one-dimensional. You can be many
things to many people, so long as it's not out of guilt, obligation, or competition,
but rather true to your heart and soul's desires. The fault is not in our stars,
but in ourselves, from Julius Caesar. Your circumstances, past, present, and future,
are a function of the choices you make about your actions and your attitude.
All the world's a stage, men and women merely players, from as you like it. Are you even aware
of the different masks and roles you put on every day? Remember you can take them off anytime,
and don't take it all so seriously. Hit the subscribe button for more
minute inspirational videos and other full-length motivational videos.
Remember, enjoy riding the wave of good fortune.
